attributes.body_preview_2000c:
@router.get("/evidence_matrix")
	async def get_evidence_matrix(
	    gene: str = Query(..., description="Gene symbol to query"),
	    rs_ccne1_amplified: bool = Query(False, description="CCNE1 amplification status"),
	    rs_tp53_lof: bool = Query(False, description="TP53 loss-of-function status"),
	    rs_mbd4_lof: bool = Query(False, description="MBD4 loss-of-function status"),
	    rs_msi_h: bool = Query(False, description="Microsatellite instability high status"),
	    rs_arid1a_lof: bool = Query(False, description="ARID1A loss-of-function status"),
	    rs_myc_amplified: bool = Query(False, description="MYC amplification status"),
	):
	    rs_features = RSFeatureSet(
	        ccne1_amplified=rs_ccne1_amplified,
	        tp53_lof=rs_tp53_lof,
	        mbd4_lof=rs_mbd4_lof,
	        msi_h=rs_msi_h,
	        arid1a_lof=rs_arid1a_lof,
	        myc_amplified=rs_myc_amplified,
	    )
	    return build_evidence_matrix(gene=gene, rs_features=rs_features)
